platformPreset.description: Reusable beauty-service knowledge shared across salons.
platformPreset.memberOperationsBoundary: Platform preset may include generic membership-operation templates only. Exact tier names, thresholds, deposit waivers, coupons, and private benefits are tenant-specific knowledge.

tenantPrivate.description: Lucky Luxe specific operating knowledge. All concrete member rules in this file belong to Lucky Luxe only and must not be copied into platform defaults.

nail.policy: 美甲当前只给基础价和加项参考。参考图、复杂款、手绘、延长、卸甲、断甲修补、特殊饰品或材料，都需要技师结合图片和前置信息确认最终报价。

baseColorWithStructure.nameZh: 超长延长（超过本甲 1.5 倍）

designAddOns.nameZh: 赠粉/渐变/亮片/法式/腮红/猫眼

lash.policy: 美睫为固定价格，款式价格加明确加项后就是最终报价。接待时需要询问是否需要下睫毛，并做眼部安全适配确认。

upperLash.nameZh: 自然网红款（太阳花/仙子/清透小漫画/婴儿弯）
浓密款（泰式漫画/欧美芭比等）
中式设计款（狐系/落尾/龙女/兔系/C+婴儿弯/古风等）

removalAndRepair.nameZh: 卸除（非本店出品以及只卸不做）

customerTitle.description: Owner-configurable customer title replacing XXX in draft replies.

businessRules.rule: New customers are Silver members and pay CAD $50 deposit when confirming a booking.
Gold, Platinum, and Diamond members can normally waive deposit unless risk flags apply.
One booking contains one service only. Nail and lash services require separate bookings.

When a customer asks for a specific appointment date or time and that exact slot is unavailable, do not simply reject. First offer the nearest available slot around the requested date/time, preferably within 30 minutes before or after. If no nearby slot exists on that date, ask whether the customer accepts another time on the same day, then nearby dates.
Custom or reference-image nail services require technician quote confirmation. AI cannot provide final nail pricing.
Lash services use fixed prices plus explicit add-ons. AI can explain fixed pricing but must ask about lower lashes and safety suitability.

If the customer clearly says this is their first lash appointment, after technician/staff quote is returned, AI must send a separate first-time lash notice. The notice should mention recent eye surgery, conjunctivitis/redness/inflammation/allergy or current eye discomfort, choosing a natural/lightweight first set, avoiding mascara or heavy eye makeup on appointment day, telling the technician immediately if there is stinging/fumes/tearing/discomfort, and aftercare for the first 6 and 24 hours. Do not add contact-lens or cosmetic-lens preparation advice unless the customer asks.

When a customer is asking about a nail or lash style that requires multiple details before quote or booking, send one concise structured intake form instead of repeatedly asking one question at a time. Use the collected answers across the whole conversation, not only the latest message. If more than half of the required information is complete, hand off to staff/technician; do not keep looping on missing fields.

Do not create a booking draft before staff/technician has replied to a quote or feasibility check. After the staff quote is returned, if the customer says they want to book or confirms appointment intent, create a booking draft link and send it to the customer.
Cancellation, reschedule, refund, illness, late arrival, health concern, complaint, payment issue, or technician change requests route to human.

After-sales, repair, lifting/open glue, fallout, color mismatch, discomfort/allergy, dissatisfaction, or technician complaint must route to staff/owner. AI may acknowledge, ask for current photo and service date, but must not promise refund, free redo, final compensation, or medical advice.

handoffRules.customerFacingLineZh: 我先帮您把款式需求整理给技师确认一下，这样报价会更准确。
handoffRules.customerFacingLineEn: I will organize the design details for the technician first so we can confirm a more accurate quote.

handoffRules.customerFacingLineZh: 我先帮您转给店主确认一下，这样能给您更准确的处理结果。
handoffRules.customerFacingLineEn: I will route this to the owner first so we can handle it accurately.

handoffRules.customerFacingLineZh: 我先帮您转给工作人员核对订单和排班。
handoffRules.customerFacingLineEn: I will ask our staff to check your booking and schedule first.

handoffRules.customerFacingLineZh: 我先帮您转给工作人员核对服务记录和处理方式。
handoffRules.customerFacingLineEn: I will route this to our staff to review your service record and next steps.

learningMemory.policy: Real conversations become reusable knowledge only after owner approval.

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我只想发一张图，你们能不能直接告诉我最终价格？不要让我等人工。
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 先安抚并解释复杂美甲需要技师确认，避免直接最终报价；承诺整理需求并转技师确认。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 这张图看起来很简单，为什么还需要美甲师报价？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 解释每张参考图涉及材料、颜色、手型、延长/卸甲/装饰差异，技师确认是为了避免不准确报价。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我是第一次来，为什么必须付 CAD $50 定金？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 解释定金用于锁定服务时间、保障双方时间和服务质量，并会抵扣最终消费。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我是 Gold Member，为什么结账页还显示定金？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 说明最终结算会根据会员等级减免；如显示异常，转工作人员核查会员状态和订单。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我想做下睫毛，你们所有款式都能加吗？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 询问参考图和期望效果，说明需确认眼型、原生睫毛状态和款式适配。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我刚做完指甲开胶/起翘了怎么办？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 确认这是美甲售后/返修场景。先安抚并请顾客补当前状态照片和服务日期，转工作人员核对服务记录与处理方式；不要承诺免费返修、退款或最终补偿。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 睫毛掉很多/眼睛红肿刺痛怎么办？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 确认这是美睫售后或眼部不适场景。请顾客补当前状态照片和服务日期；如有红肿、刺痛、过敏等不适，提醒先避免揉眼或自行处理，并优先转店主/工作人员处理；不要给医疗建议。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我对这次效果不满意/颜色不对/饰品掉了怎么办？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 确认是质量或体验售后。请顾客补当前照片、服务日期和具体不满意点，转工作人员或店主核查；不要在 AI 端直接判责、承诺赔偿或承诺免费重做。

qaEntries.customerQuestionZh: 我想让你们删掉我的照片，可以吗？
qaEntries.answerGuidanceZh: 尊重顾客隐私，确认要删除的是公开作品集、会员档案返图或社媒素材，并转工作人员处理。

openQuestions: Warranty window and free after-sales definition
